description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with large, arched windows dominating each facade, allowing for ample natural light. The structure is primarily white with black accents, and includes a spacious outdoor swimming pool adjacent to the main building. Several mature trees are positioned around the property, enhancing its urban residential appeal. The house appears to have two stories, with a flat roof and open interior spaces visible through the windows. A driveway leads to a parked car, suggesting a dedicated entryway and garage area. The overall layout is open and airy, with a focus on geometric lines and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with large arched windows, flat roof, and a swimming pool, surrounded by trees and a driveway with a car.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the pool, driveway, and a side with prominent arched windows and trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the pool side, revealing the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and more of the open interior.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, with the pool, flat roof, and a car parked near the structure.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the front facade, showcasing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of arched windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent door, steps, and a driveway, flanked by large arched windows and minimal decorative elements.
